channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-07-11)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-07-11.

item.title: [HOT] Softube|Softube Weekly Deals – 73% off on Echoes delay plugin.!? NEW
[HOT] Sonnox|Sonnox Summer Sale has been extended – up to 87% off on plugins and bundles.!? NEW BIG DISCOUNT
[FREEBIE] NoizLabs|NoizLabs has released Beheader clipper and saturation plugin for Mac & Win. The plugin is available as a free download for a limited time.!? NEW
[HOT] UVI|UVI Bastille Day Sale – get a $/?30 off on purchases of $/?99 or more with the code: BASTILLE30; get a $/?50 off on purchases of $/?149 or more with the code: BASTILLE50.!? NEW
